timeline.title: The Spark
timeline.description: SYNTH bootstraps and begins analyzing before acting.

timeline.title: The Idea
timeline.description: Human intent is captured as a Mission.

timeline.title: The Plan
timeline.description: The Mission is decomposed into Expeditions and Objectives, then approved.

timeline.title: The AI Works
timeline.description: The approved Plan is executed through the CLI surface.

timeline.title: Nothing Was Forgotten
timeline.description: Every action is recorded as an immutable Event.

timeline.title: State
timeline.description: The final State shows all work completed.

timeline.title: Replay
timeline.description: Replay verifies that State matches the 32-event history.

timeline.title: Your Turn
timeline.description: The user is invited to install SYNTH and create their first Mission.
